task_completion.description: Modify the 'Normal' paragraph style to Liberation Serif, 11pt
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Paragraph Style dialog for 'Normal' showing the font set to Liberation Serif and size to 11pt, or the main body text of the document visibly changing to a serif font with these properties.

task_completion.description: Modify the 'Heading 1' paragraph style to Liberation Sans, 16pt, Dark Blue
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Paragraph Style dialog for 'Heading 1' showing the font set to Liberation Sans, size 16pt, and color Dark Blue (#000080), or the document's main headings visibly updating to this style.

task_completion.description: Create a new paragraph style named 'WarningText' with Italic and Red font
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Create Style' or 'Paragraph Style' dialog showing a new style named 'WarningText' (based on Normal) with font effects set to Italic and font color set to Red.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'WarningText' style to the three 'WARNING:' paragraphs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the three paragraphs starting with 'WARNING:' appearing in red italics. The 'WarningText' style should be highlighted in the Styles sidebar or formatting toolbar when the cursor is on these paragraphs.

task_completion.description: Clear all direct formatting from the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent selecting the document text (e.g., Ctrl+A) and clicking 'Clear Direct Formatting' from the Format menu, right-click context menu, or toolbar (often an icon with an 'A' and an eraser or 'x').
Look for the 'Save As' dialog being used to save the file to '/home/ga/Documents/omnibase_rebranded.docx', or the LibreOffice Writer window title bar updating to 'omnibase_rebranded.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Writer GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the LibreOffice Writer application windows, menus, and style sidebars, rather than a terminal window running python scripts (like python-docx) or bash commands to manipulate the file.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual paragraph styles rather than just applying direct formatting
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent opening the 'Styles' deck (F11) and editing the properties of 'Normal' and 'Heading 1', rather than just highlighting text and changing the font/color from the top toolbar.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter the actual content of the manual
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the document text in the screenshots; the actual words and paragraphs of the OmniBase manual should remain unchanged, with only the visual formatting and styles being altered.
